name: Vicapsys Life Sciences, Inc.
business: Vicapsys Life Sciences develops and commercializes encapsulated product candidates incorporating proprietary derivatives of the chemokine CXCL12 for creating a zone of immunoprotection around cells, tissues, organs and devices for therapeutic purposes. The lead product candidate is an encapsulated human islet cell cluster intended to restore normal glucose control in Type 1 Diabetes patients. The company also develops the VYBRIN product line for anti-fibrotic applications including prevention of post-surgical adhesions, coating of implantable medical devices, and wound healing.

exposures.sentence: The Company's strategy is to develop and commercialize, on a worldwide basis, various intellectual property rights (patents, patent applications, know how, etc.) relating to a series of encapsulated product candidates that incorporate proprietary derivatives of the chemokine CXCL12 for creating a zone of immunoprotection around cells, tissues, organs and devices for therapeutic purposes.

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase I clinical trial of a Product or Process
catalysts.sentence: The Company shall initiate a Phase I clinical trial of a Product or Process by March 1st, 2024.
The Company shall initiate a Phase II clinical trial of a Product or Process within thirteen (13) years from Effective Date.
The Company shall initiate Phase III clinical trial of a Product or Process within sixteen (16) years from Effective Date.

catalysts.event: First Commercial Sale in US, Europe, and China or Japan
catalysts.sentence: The Company shall itself or through an Affiliate or Sublicensee make a First Commercial Sale within the following countries and regions in the License Territory within eighteen (18) years after the Effective Date of this Agreement: US and Europe and China or Japan.

tamClaims.claim: Nearly 1.6 million Americans have Type 1 Diabetes, a 30% increase from 2017.
tamClaims.sentence: That totals nearly 1.6 million Americans with T1D up from 1.25 million people or nearly 30% from 2017.

tamClaims.claim: 1.4 million adults and 187,000 children in the US have Type 1 Diabetes.
tamClaims.sentence: The CDC's 2020 National Diabetes Statistics Report cites that in the United States, T1D diagnoses included 1.4 million adults, 20 years and older, and 187,000 children younger than 20.
